creator: exploringlondon
caption:
London’s newest exhibition is here and it will take you 200 million years back in time to the Jurassic Oceans 🌊 ad-pr

This is the @natural_history_museum’s newest exhibition, Jurassic Oceans: Monsters of the Deep 🐋 which invites you to plunge into ancient waters and come face-to-face with the terrifying creatures that hunted beneath the waves while dinosaurs roamed the Earth 🦕

✋ Touch a mosasaur tooth, feel a cast of a dinosaur claw and even hold Jurassic poo!
🌊 Learn about marine reptiles, enormous fish and intricate ammonites
🦈 Come face-to-face with the plesiosaurs with a long neck and four flippers, something not seen before or since, making them truly one of a kind!

Share this with someone who would love to visit!
📍 Cromwell Rd, South Kensington, London SW7 5BD
🗓️ The exhibition opens on Friday 22nd May
⏰ Monday – Sunday 10.00-17.50    
🎟️ Peak: Adult £17.50, child £8.75, Off-peak: Adult £15.00, child £7.50, Members, patrons and children under 4 go free

transcription.text: This is London's brand new exhibition and it will take you 200 million years back in time to the Jurassic Oceans. This is the Natural History Museum's brand new exhibition Jurassic Oceans Monsters of the Deep. It really feels like you've gone underwater here with huge projections and lighting, fossils and incredible skeletons and so many interactive elements. You can even touch some of the exhibits. It's completely immersive, definitely want to check out. Find more details in the caption.
